title: A Father’s Life Is Erased
description: On pages 8–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, York, Marines, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Jinbe as Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.
scene: Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Captain, the Navy will take notice if you keep causing a scene!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the last time I'll see your face...

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: that pirate just hit a celestial dragon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: The whole world knows that's taboo!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And we're so close to Navy HQ too!!! it's practically suicide!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: He did it to protect a fishman?!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No one has done anything this bold...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: for hundreds and hundreds of years!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I hope you can forgive me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I didn't mean to desert you without a word.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At least I can leave my own quiet mark on the world...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm just showing you the level you have to be in the new world!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You and your friends just aren't ready!!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney Flashback through 37 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
